title: [spec-compliance] duplicate content_format in lichen-node/dispatch.rs
description: lichen-node/src/dispatch.rs:44-50 still duplicates APPLICATION_SENML_CBOR=112 and others from lichen_coap::option::content_format and lichen_core::constants (canonical source per spec/README.md and constants.toml). Commit 78368c1aa removed only the CBOR clash but left duplication. Violates "single source of truth for constants" in spec/07-transport-app.md and constants.toml. Should import and use shared constants exclusively. See explore review for details.
